name: McKinsey Supply Chain 4.0 — Daily Agent Run

nodes.name: Trigger: 8 AM Weekdays
nodes.notes: Runs every weekday at 8 AM. Change cron to 0 8 * * * for daily including weekends.

nodes.name: Fetch: Google Trends (Demand Signal)
nodes.notes: FREE ALTERNATIVE: Use pytrends Python script node instead if no SerpAPI key. SerpAPI free tier = 100 searches/month.

nodes.name: Fetch: Warehouse Inventory (Supply Signal)
nodes.notes: Reads live inventory from Google Sheets. Update SHEET_ID with your sheet. Free with Google account.

nodes.name: Code: Lever 1 — Demand Sensing
nodes.notes: Replicates McKinsey Lever 1. Edit CALIBRATION_FACTOR when you get real sales data.

nodes.name: Code: Lever 3 — Inventory Optimisation
nodes.notes: Replicates McKinsey Lever 3. This is your core agent logic running in n8n.

nodes.name: Code: Build Slack Message
nodes.notes: Formats the McKinsey analysis output into a Slack HITL message.

nodes.name: Send: Slack Alert (HITL Approval)
nodes.notes: Sends to your Slack channel. Go to api.slack.com/apps → Incoming Webhooks → free. Add SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to n8n environment variables.

nodes.name: Log: Google Sheets (Audit Trail)
nodes.notes: Logs every agent run to Google Sheets. This is your audit trail and KPI tracker.

_meta.description: McKinsey Supply Chain 4.0 Replication — Daily n8n Workflow
_meta.author: Ridhi Jain
setup_steps: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Workflows → Import)
3. Create Google Sheets credential in n8n (OAuth2)
5. Activate workflow for daily 8 AM run
